summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LOTTOLAB Multi-tenant Lottery SaaS Platform. Tested all 3 user roles (Super Admin, Company Admin, Agent POS) with authentication, dashboard functionality, and RBAC enforcement. Backend APIs 95.7% successful, frontend core flows working.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to pydantic email validation failure with .local domains
critical_bugs.impact: Super Admin cannot view users list

security_fixes_applied.issue: RBAC vulnerability - Agents could access company admin stats
security_fixes_applied.fix: Added role validation to ensure only COMPANY_ADMIN/COMPANY_MANAGER/AUDITOR_READONLY can access

design_issues.issue: React hydration warnings in console about HTML structure (<tr> span nesting)

passed_tests: Super Admin login and redirect to /super/dashboard
Super Admin dashboard stats display (companies: 4, agents: 4, tickets: 0)
Super Admin companies list and creation
Company Admin login and redirect to /company/dashboard
Company Admin dashboard stats (tickets, sales, agents, lotteries)
Company Admin agents page and creation modal
Company Admin lottery catalog with enable/disable toggles
Company Admin results page and posting
Agent POS login and redirect to /pos
POS interface with search and cart functionality
RBAC enforcement - Agents blocked from company/super admin pages
API endpoints for all CRUD operations
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Super Admin /api/super/users endpoint email validation issue with .local domains. Consider updating agent email format or email validation rules.
